basic_details.job_title: Delhi University Guest Faculty Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: Delhi University Guest Faculty Notification 2026 has been released on 20 July 2026 on the official website du.ac.in. A total of 9 vacancies have been announced through the Delhi University Guest Faculty Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Master's degree with 55% marks (or equivalent grade) in concerned/relevant/allied subject (50% for reserved categories), National Eligibility Test (NET) (exempted for Italian posts)
qualification.details: Guest Faculty (French, German, Spanish, Italian): Master's degree with 55% marks (or equivalent grade) in the concerned/relevant/allied subject. For reserved categories, a minimum of 50% marks is required. National Eligibility Test (NET) is mandatory, except for Italian posts where it is exempted.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Delhi University Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://www.du.ac.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 27-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download Delhi University Job 2026 Notification PDF

rows.delhi_university: Master's degree with 55% marks (or equivalent grade) in concerned/relevant/allied subject (50% for reserved categories), National Eligibility Test (NET) (exempted for Italian posts)

content_sections.heading: Delhi University Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the Delhi University Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download Delhi University Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Guest Faculty (French, German, Spanish, Italian): Master's degree with 55% marks (or equivalent grade) in the concerned/relevant/allied subject. For reserved categories, a minimum of 50% marks is required. National Eligibility Test (NET) is mandatory, except for Italian posts where it is exempted.

rows.event: Last Date for Submission of Application

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for Delhi University Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: https://www.du.ac.in. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 27-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Delhi University Guest Faculty positions?
faq.answer: The last date for submitting the offline application for the Delhi University Guest Faculty positions is 27th July 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well in advance to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. What are the educational qualifications required for the Guest Faculty posts?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Master's degree with 55% marks (50% for reserved categories) in the relevant subject and have qualified the National Eligibility Test (NET), with an exemption for Italian posts.

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are available for the Guest Faculty positions?
faq.answer: There are a total of 9 vacancies for the Guest Faculty positions across various language departments, including French, German, Spanish, and Italian.

faq.question: Q4. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is offline. Candidates need to download the application form from the official website and submit it via post or as instructed in the notification.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for Delhi University Guest Faculty recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary structure for the Guest Faculty positions?
faq.answer: The salary for the Guest Faculty positions will be as per UGC norms, providing a standard remuneration for the role.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Guest Faculty positions will primarily involve an interview. Candidates will be shortlisted based on their qualifications and performance in the interview.

faq.question: Q8. Can candidates from outside Delhi apply for these positions?
faq.answer: The notification does not specify any domicile restrictions. However, candidates should be prepared to work in Delhi if selected. It is advisable to check the official notification for any specific eligibility criteria.

faq.question: Q9. What documents are required to be submitted with the application form?
faq.answer: Candidates are required to attach self-attested copies of necessary documents, including photograph, signature, ID proof, and relevant educational certificates, as specified in the official notification.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website of Delhi University, which is https://www.du.ac.in.
